scene_input.scene_summary: The Prophet stands on a mountain overlooking the city of Thaqīf, looking out at the people with concern.
scene_input.key_visual_action: The Prophet looks out at the city with a worried expression.

schema_output.scene_summary: The Prophet stands on a mountain overlooking the city of Thaqīf, looking out at the people with concern.
schema_output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, p. 317
schema_output.moral_lesson: The importance of compassion and care for others

characters.name: the central figure
characters.appearance: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a distinctive deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades

schema_output.narrative_text: The Prophet looked out at the city of Thaqīf with a worried heart, seeing the people struggling with darkness and ignorance.
schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. A rugged mountain slope in the Arabian Desert, with rocks and scrubby plants in shades of earthy brown and beige, stretching up to a rocky outcropping where the central figure stands, seen from behind. The sun casts a warm golden light on the scene, with a gentle breeze rustling the leaves of nearby plants. The central figure looks out at a distant city, Thaqīf, with a small cluster of buildings and people visible in the valley below. The city is surrounded by a few palm trees and a small stream, giving a sense of life and vitality. The central figure's deep green cloak is a striking color anchor in the warm earth tones of the mountain. Soft warm golden light, a sense of stillness and contemplation. Medium shot from behind the central figure, looking out at the city. Earthy palette with the deep green cloak as a dominant color. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
